task_objective: Guard parallel Ibis execution against unsafe backends
design_decisions: Implemented _check_parallel_safety() to identify backends that are not thread-safe for shared connections (e.g., DuckDB, SQLite).
Modified Profiler.run() to disable parallel execution and emit a warning when an unsafe backend is detected.
Updated parallel pass guards in _run_advanced_pass and _run_complex_pass to respect the updated self.parallel flag.
Updated existing mock tests to explicitly set parallel=True where needed to trigger parallel paths.
results: Correctness and stability risks for concurrent queries on shared connections are mitigated. Parallel mode now safely falls back to sequential execution with a warning for DuckDB and SQLite. Full test suite passes.
